name: Ties That Bind
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>仲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>なか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>間</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>絆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きずな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control "Shining Sarcophagus" and a monster that mentions it: Special Summon up to 2 Level 4 or lower monsters with different names that mention "Shining Sarcophagus" from your hand and/or Deck, also, for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck. You can only activate 1 "Ties That Bind" per turn.
eff: If you control "Shining Sarcophagus" and a monster that mentions it: Special Summon up to 2 Level 4 or lower monsters with different names that mention "Shining Sarcophagus" from your hand and/or Deck, also, for the rest of this turn after this card resolves, you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck. You can only activate 1 "Ties That Bind" per turn.

summoning: Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Deck
